# Mamba

> Force-typed Python compiler. Lexes Python source with `logos`, lowers through HIR/MIR, and emits native machine code via Cranelift JIT/AOT. Not a transpiler, not an interpreter ŌĆö produces real binaries. Project goals tracked in #1265: (G1) CPython 3.12 source compatibility, (G2) faster than CPython 3.12, (G3) 100% test pass.

The `mamba` crate is the compiler + runtime. Native bindings register through the separate `cclab-mamba-registry` crate (the ABI contract ŌĆö `MbValue`, `MambaModule`, `MAMBA_MODULES`). Binding crates self-register via `linkme` distributed slices and are statically linked at final-binary build time.

Pipeline: source ŌåÆ `lexer` ŌåÆ `parser` ŌåÆ `resolve` ŌåÆ `types` (force-typed inference) ŌåÆ `hir` ŌåÆ `mir` ŌåÆ `codegen` (Cranelift) ŌåÆ native. Runtime is a small Rust core (`runtime/`) backing `MbValue` operations, gc, generators, async tasks, and the stdlib shims under `runtime/stdlib/`.

## Entry points

- [src/main.rs](src/main.rs): binary entrypoint; force-links first-party binding crates via `use {crate}_mamba as _;`
- [src/lib.rs](src/lib.rs): library root; re-exports compiler stages and `runtime`
- [src/driver/](src/driver/): CLI verbs (`run`, `build`, `bench`, `repl`, `check`)
- [Cargo.toml](Cargo.toml): crate manifest; force-link list lives in `[dependencies]`

## Compiler stages

- [src/lexer/](src/lexer/): logos-based DFA tokenizer
- [src/parser/](src/parser/): hand-written Pratt parser ŌåÆ AST
- [src/resolve/](src/resolve/): name resolution, scope analysis
- [src/types/](src/types/): force-typed inference (no `Any` fallback path)
- [src/hir/](src/hir/): typed high-level IR
- [src/lower/](src/lower/): HIR ŌåÆ MIR lowering
- [src/mir/](src/mir/): mid-level IR + optimisation passes
- [src/codegen/cranelift/](src/codegen/cranelift/): Cranelift backend (JIT + AOT)
- [src/codegen/llvm.rs](src/codegen/llvm.rs): experimental LLVM backend (deferred)
- [src/diagnostic/](src/diagnostic/): error reporting with source spans
- [src/source/](src/source/): source-file management, span resolution

## Runtime

- [src/runtime/mod.rs](src/runtime/mod.rs): runtime root; loads `MAMBA_MODULES` at startup
- [src/runtime/rc.rs](src/runtime/rc.rs): `MbObject`, refcount header, `MbValue` accessors
- [src/runtime/gc.rs](src/runtime/gc.rs): cycle collector (periodic sweep over tracked containers)
- [src/runtime/list_ops.rs](src/runtime/list_ops.rs), [dict_ops.rs](src/runtime/dict_ops.rs), [set_ops.rs](src/runtime/set_ops.rs), [string_ops.rs](src/runtime/string_ops.rs), [bytes_ops.rs](src/runtime/bytes_ops.rs): container ops
- [src/runtime/bigint_ops.rs](src/runtime/bigint_ops.rs): arbitrary-precision integer ops
- [src/runtime/iter.rs](src/runtime/iter.rs), [generator.rs](src/runtime/generator.rs): iterator + generator protocol
- [src/runtime/async_rt.rs](src/runtime/async_rt.rs), [async_task.rs](src/runtime/async_task.rs): asyncio-compatible event loop on tokio
- [src/runtime/class.rs](src/runtime/class.rs), [closure.rs](src/runtime/closure.rs): user-defined classes + closures
- [src/runtime/exception.rs](src/runtime/exception.rs): exception object + raise/catch
- [src/runtime/builtins.rs](src/runtime/builtins.rs): `print`, `len`, `type`, `isinstance`, ŌĆ”
- [src/runtime/stdlib/](src/runtime/stdlib/): per-module stdlib shims (os, json, re, itertools, ŌĆ”)

## Tests & conformance

Two distinct denominators ŌĆö do not conflate:

**Self-defined fixtures (regression baseline, not a CPython compat metric).** These are fixtures we authored ourselves; passing them prevents regressions but does not prove CPython compatibility. See #1398 for the retraction.

- [tests/harness/cpython/runner.rs](tests/harness/cpython/runner.rs): top-level conformance runner
- [tests/harness/cpython/status.rs](tests/harness/cpython/status.rs): fast CPython fixture/perf/oracle readiness summary ŌĆö `cargo test -p mamba --test cpython_status -- --json`; fill baseline gaps with `python3 tests/cpython/tools/perf_baseline.py record --missing-only --ready-only --limit 10 --keep-going`
- [tests/harness/cpython/tools/runtime_fast_loop.py](tests/harness/cpython/tools/runtime_fast_loop.py): runtime fix inner loop ŌĆö one guarded debug build when needed, then changed-fixture/lib-cluster `sweep.py` validation in seconds
- [tests/cpython_compat.rs](tests/cpython_compat.rs): CPython behaviour parity fixtures
- [tests/generator_conformance_tests.rs](tests/generator_conformance_tests.rs), [iterator_conformance_tests.rs](tests/iterator_conformance_tests.rs)
- [tests/behavioral_builtins_tests.rs](tests/behavioral_builtins_tests.rs), [behavioral_lang_tests.rs](tests/behavioral_lang_tests.rs), [behavioral_stdlib_tests.rs](tests/behavioral_stdlib_tests.rs)
- [tests/p0_conformance_tests.rs](tests/p0_conformance_tests.rs): P0-tier core language fixtures
- [tests/cpython/fixtures/](tests/cpython/fixtures/): `.py` / `.json` fixture inputs grouped by bucket (core / pep / builtin-libs / std-libs / 3rd-libs / type-strict)
- [tests/cpython/cpython_ported/](tests/cpython/cpython_ported/): hand-ported CPython tests (small subset)

**External denominator (real Goal 1 metric ŌĆö pending).** Not yet wired:

- #1396 ŌĆö adopt CPython 3.12 `Lib/test/test_*.py` as canonical conformance suite (T1 language core / T2 hot stdlib / T3 long tail)
- #1397 ŌĆö typeshed-based per-module API surface coverage

## Benchmarks

- [src/bench/mod.rs](src/bench/mod.rs): bench harness; 8 benches (`int_sum_loop`, `int_mul_loop`, `fib_recursive`, `factorial_recursive`, `range_sum_loop`, `generator_sum`, `list_sort_builtin`, `string_concat`)
- [benches/mamba_bench.rs](benches/mamba_bench.rs): criterion driver
- Run: `mamba bench --compare cpython --json /tmp/bench-$(date +%s).json`
- Tier targets (#1265): compute Ōēź10├Ś CPython, app Ōēź3├Ś, dynamic Ōēź1.5├Ś, floor Ōēź1.0├Ś

## Surface coverage (typeshed)

- [src/surface.rs](src/surface.rs): typeshed surface-coverage tool (Phase 1.D) ŌĆö `mamba surface-report --package <lib>`; compares names registered via `attrs.insert("<name>".to_string(), ...)` in `runtime/stdlib/<lib>_mod.rs` (and `runtime/stdlib/3p/<lib>_mod.rs`) against top-level `def`/`class` lines in `projects/mamba/vendor/typeshed/stdlib/<lib>.pyi` (stdlib) or `projects/mamba/vendor/typeshed/stubs/<lib>/<lib>.pyi` (3p). Emits `implemented/total = N/M (P%)` + missing list. Reference numbers: `os` = 11/77 (14%), `ssl` = 0/25 (0%, not implemented). Typeshed is vendored locally ŌĆö re-create with `git clone --depth=1 https://github.com/python/typeshed.git projects/mamba/vendor/typeshed` (33 MB, gitignored).

## Conformance runners

External-fixture conformance harnesses (Phase 1) live under
`projects/mamba/tests/cpython/` with two parallel buckets
per library: `<lib>/real_world/<scenario>.py` for R4 exit-0 gates and
`<lib>/bench/<scenario>.py` for cross-runtime timing. Convention is in
[tests/cpython/conventions/REAL-WORLD-CONVENTION.md](tests/cpython/conventions/REAL-WORLD-CONVENTION.md).

- [tests/harness/cpython/real_world.rs](tests/harness/cpython/real_world.rs): real-world fixture runner (Phase 1.E) ŌĆö `cargo test -p mamba --test conformance_real_world -- --ignored`
- [benches/3p/cross_runtime.rs](benches/3p/cross_runtime.rs): cross-runtime bench (Phase 1.C) ŌĆö `cargo bench -p mamba --bench cross_runtime_3p`; emits `[lib/scenario] mamba/cpython = X.YYx (PASS|FAIL @ floor 1.0x)` per fixture, exits non-zero on FAIL. Today's wired ratio: `_baseline/fib_recursive` Ōēł 17x.
- [src/conformance/pytest_runner.rs](src/conformance/pytest_runner.rs): pytest-under-mamba runner (Phases 1.A + 1.B) ŌĆö `mamba pytest <file-or-dir> [--timeout SECS] [-j N]`. **Two discovery branches**, dispatched by `detect_layout`:
  - **Unittest (Phase 1.A)** ŌĆö `class X(unittest.TestCase)` + `def test_*(self)`. Picked for CPython `Lib/test/` paths.
  - **Pytest (Phase 1.B)** ŌĆö module-scope `def test_*(...)`. Picked for `vendor_tests/`, `/3p/`, `site-packages/`, or any path containing a `tests/` segment (vendor PyPI layout). Recognises `@pytest.mark.{skip,xfail,parametrize}`; parametrize fans out one case per param row with label `test_name[i]`; tests requesting unsupported fixtures emit an ERROR record (never silent PASS ŌĆö acceptance gate). `conftest.py` siblings are prepended to each harness so fixtures defined there are in scope (outermost-first concat order).
  Both branches spawn **one subprocess per test case** (mamba's assertion helpers panic from `extern "C"` and cannot unwind ŌĆö the only reliable isolation is process boundary). Exit-classifies each child: 0 + `MAMBA_PYTEST_END` marker ŌåÆ PASS; non-zero stderr containing `SkipTest:` ŌåÆ SKIP; non-zero panic ŌåÆ FAIL; load-check failure ŌåÆ one ERROR record for the whole file. Top-level `unittest.main()` calls are rewritten to `pass` so the per-test harness owns execution. Run-level exit is non-zero iff any FAIL or ERROR.
  Baseline pytest-layout fixture: [tests/cpython/fixtures/3rd-libs/_baseline/vendor_tests/test_smoke.py](tests/cpython/fixtures/3rd-libs/_baseline/vendor_tests/test_smoke.py) (1 PASS + 1 FAIL + exit 1).

## Project config

- [src/config/](src/config/): `mamba.toml` schema + parser
- [src/pkgmgr/](src/pkgmgr/): package manager (resolver, installer, PyPI client) ŌĆö Epic 2
- [cpython_known_failures.toml](cpython_known_failures.toml): per-test allowlist of known CPython-compat failures
- [MAMBA_INTEGRATION.md](MAMBA_INTEGRATION.md): how to write a native binding crate (`MambaModule` trait, `rt_sym!`, `mamba.toml [crates.*]` schema)
- [NOTES-NEXT.md](NOTES-NEXT.md): autonomous-loop scratchpad ŌĆö single-fire investigation notes

## Key external references

- [../../crates/cclab-mamba-registry/](../../crates/cclab-mamba-registry/): the ABI contract (`MbValue`, `MambaModule`, `MAMBA_MODULES`, `rt_sym!`)
- [../../crates/cclab-fetch-mamba/](../../crates/cclab-fetch-mamba/): canonical first-party binding example (async HTTP client)
- [mambalibs/httpkit/binding/](mambalibs/httpkit/binding/): higher-level binding example (FastAPI-style router)
- [../../CLAUDE.md](../../CLAUDE.md): repo-wide working-tree, SDD, and CRRR rules
- [../../ECOSYSTEM.md](../../ECOSYSTEM.md): 4-layer ecosystem map (runtime / libraries / framework / agkit)

## Build & install

- Debug build: `.claude/skills/mamba-build-debug/scripts/build.sh` (no version bump)
- Release build (benchmark-grade, base-64 patch bump + tag): `.claude/skills/mamba-build-release/scripts/release.sh`
- Both scripts install to `~/.cargo/bin/mamba` and codesign on macOS
- Manual: `cargo build [--release] -p mamba --bin mamba`

## Issue tracking

Issues live on GitHub under `chrischeng-c4/cclab` with the `project:mamba` label. Three monitoring angles:

- **Angle A ŌĆö Conformance** (Goal 1): titles prefixed `conformance(mamba):`
- **Angle B ŌĆö Tests** (Goal 3): titles prefixed `test(mamba):`
- **Angle C ŌĆö Performance** (Goal 2): titles prefixed `perf(mamba):` or `bug(mamba): bench fairness ŌĆö`

Live north-star issues: #1265 (perf superiority), #1260 (Goal 1 status), #1274 (floor violators), #1276 (tier dashboard).

## Optional

- [src/ffi/](src/ffi/): C-ABI shims for libc, libm, dlfcn
- [src/conformance/](src/conformance/): runtime-side conformance helpers (used by tests)
- [tests/jit_tests.rs](tests/jit_tests.rs), [jit_refcount_tests.rs](tests/jit_refcount_tests.rs), [jit_refcount_audit_tests.rs](tests/jit_refcount_audit_tests.rs): JIT-specific test suites
- [tests/harness/cpython/perf_pin.rs](tests/harness/cpython/perf_pin.rs): perf regression tests (separate from `mamba bench`)
- [tests/pkgmgr_resolver_test.rs](tests/pkgmgr_resolver_test.rs), [pkgmgr_installer_test.rs](tests/pkgmgr_installer_test.rs), [pypi_index_client_integration.rs](tests/pypi_index_client_integration.rs): pkgmgr suites
- [baseline.json](baseline.json): committed bench baseline (compared against in CI)
